title: Hey Berry! SHUT UP
description: Villagers will no longer take damage from berry bushes and berry bush thorns are no longer armor piercing
body:
Villager AI is not great at times and when a village spawns in an area with berry bushes, the villagers will gladly walk around to their death.

This mod disabled damage done to villagers by evil berry bushes.

Players wearing leg protection will also be safe. No more armor piercing thorns!

There's also a config to disable berry bush damage all together.

[Discord](https://discord.gg/dD5vtrWSpx)


[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
